items.title: US to cut troop levels in Germany by 5,000 amid Trump spat with Merz
items.summary: The decision to reduce the US deployment to Germany comes amid a row between the two allies over Iran.

items.title: Trump tells Congress ceasefire means he does not need their approval for Iran war
items.summary: The president writes that hostilities "have terminated" because of the ceasefire, arguing he does not need congressional authorisation.

items.title: Thirteen killed in Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon, health ministry says
items.summary: Four women and a child are among the dead, as fighting between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah continues despite a ceasefire.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 首爾「睡午覺大賽」年輕參賽者cosplay花招百出 8旬阿北奪冠
items.summary: 數百名南韓年輕人今天（2日）齊聚首爾汝矣島漢江公園，參加首爾市府舉辦的第3屆年度春季活動「睡午覺大賽」；今年的比賽與以往略有不同，主辦單位要求參賽者睡覺兼cosplay，先扮成...…

items.title: 回應美國撤軍5000人 德國、北約同聲：須為自身安全擔更大責任
items.summary: 美國五角大廈宣佈將從北大西洋公約組織（NATO）盟邦德國，撤離5000名駐軍，對此，德國和北約2日回應均強調，歐洲有必要在共同安全上承擔更大責任。  法新社2日報導，北約發...…

items.title: 奈良規模5.7地震撼動日本西部 未發布海嘯警報
items.summary: 日本氣象廳表示，日本西部今天發生規模5.7地震，沒有發布海嘯警報。  共同社報導，根據氣象廳，當地時間晚間6時28分發生的這起地震震央位在奈良縣，震源深度70公里。在三重、奈良與和歌山等...…
